title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 3 2025

section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 3 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 03/07/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures continued to rise, with a significantly expanded increase. The most-traded contract I2509 closedat 733, up 2.45% for the day. Traders actively sold their goods, and speculative trading volume increased.
